title: stisseria glanduliflora
intro: Stisseria glanduliflora, also known as the glandular Stisseria, is a type of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Stisseria glanduliflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to limited research and potential interactions with medications.
